title: Stewing & Baking
description: Let's stew and bake vanilla food a bit more realistically and romantically!
body:
**This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, play it in the modpack to gain the best experience!**
---
You feel weird that breads, cakes, cookies, and stew can all be made just on the crafting table? Now you can do it more realistically and romantically! Using the old recipes will now give new items: dough, batter, and other uncooked food. You should stew and bake your hot food in the furnace or the smoker, and get some xps from it!

You can make stews and soups in another way. Use an empty bowl to right-click water, put it into a furnace to boil it, and then craft it with other materials to make stews!

Bon appétit!
